arts.ttl: Verona Secure Loan Deal for Fiorentina’s Nicolás Valentini
arts.sum: Hellas Verona have made a significant move in the final hours of the January transfer window, reaching an agreement with Fiorentina for the loan of defender Nicolás Valentini. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the deal, which comes just weeks after Valentini's arrival in Florence, will see the Argentine centre-back don the yellow and blue colours of Verona for the remainder of the season. The post Verona Secure Loan Deal for Fiorentina’s Nicolás Valentini appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Official: Daniel Maldini joins Atalanta from Monza for 13m
arts.sum: Daniel Maldini has completed his transfer from Monza to Atalanta for circa €13m, with half...

Atalanta have officially announced the signing of Daniel Maldini from AC Monza on a permanent transfer. The 23-year-old attacker joins the Bergamo-based club after a series of loan spells and a brief stint with Monza. The post OFFICIAL: Atalanta Sign Daniel Maldini appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Monza have officially announced the acquisition of Gaetano Castrovilli from Lazio on a loan deal that will run until the end of the current season. The Italian midfielder's move to the Biancorossi was finalized swiftly, with the player having already signed his contract on Thursday, January 30th. The post OFFICIAL: Monza Sign Gaetano Castrovilli appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Monza v Verona: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Monza prepare to host Verona in a pivotal Serie A match, both teams are dealing with significant squad adjustments due to transfers, injuries, and suspensions. The post Serie A | Monza v Verona: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Monza vs. Hellas Verona: no room for error
arts.sum: Monza have kept clean sheets in both matches at the U-Power Stadium against Hellas Verona in Serie A (2-0 win on 6 November 2022 and 0-0 draw on 11 February 2024) and have kept more clean sheets at home against no other team in the competition (two also against Salernitana). After winning the reverse fixture without conceding a goal (3-0, on 21 October), Hellas Verona could become the fifth team against which Monza have won both Serie A matches of the season with a clean sheet, after Juventus and Spezia in 2022/23 and Sassuolo and Salernitana in 2023/24.

arts.ttl: Zanetti Focused on Monza Clash Amid Transfer Speculation
arts.sum: Hellas Verona manager Paolo Zanetti addressed the media ahead of his team's crucial Serie A encounter with Monza, emphasizing the importance of the match amidst ongoing transfer market activities. The post Zanetti Focused on Monza Clash Amid Transfer Speculation appeared first on FootItalia.com.
